Chinese: 如果我是你，我现在就不会进去找他。他这会儿心情不好，见谁骂谁，看什么都不顺眼。
Pinyin: rúguǒ wǒ shì nǐ wǒ xiànzài jiù bùhuì jìnqù zhǎo tā tā zhèhuìr xīnqíng bùhǎo jiàn shéi mà shéi kàn shénme dōu bù shùnyǎn
English: I shouldn't go in and see him now if I were you. He's having one of his bad days, swearing at everything and everyone.

Chinese: 你知道是谁发明的指南针吗？
Pinyin: nǐ zhīdào shì shéi fāmíng de zhǐnánzhēn ma
English: Do you know who invents the compass?

Chinese: 不开心是他生病的根源。
Pinyin: bù kāixīn shì tā shēngbìng de gēnyuán
English: Unhappiness is the root cause of his illness.

Chinese: 他的意见没多少影响。
Pinyin: tā de yìjiàn méi duōshao yǐngxiǎng
English: His opinion doesn't carry much weight.

Chinese: 我很匆忙, 所以随便地把衣服穿上了。
Pinyin: wǒ hěn cōngmáng suǒyǐ suíbiàn dì bǎ yīfu chuānshang le
English: I was in such a hurry that I put my clothes on anyhow.

Chinese: 我指望你来安排一切。
Pinyin: wǒ zhǐwàng nǐ lái ānpái yīqiè
English: I am banking upon you to help me with arrangements.

Chinese: 自从他是小孩时，他就喜欢狗。
Pinyin: zìcóng tā shì xiǎohái shí tā jiù xǐhuan gǒu
English: He has liked dogs since he was a child.

Chinese: 她写了一本关于巴黎公社的书。
Pinyin: tā xiě le yī běn guānyú Bālí Gōngshè de shū
English: She wrote a book on the Paris Commune.

Chinese: 即使这工作要花掉我六个星期的时间，我仍决心要把它完成。
Pinyin: jíshǐ zhè gōngzuò yào huādiào wǒ liù gè xīngqī de shíjiān wǒ réng juéxīn yào bǎ tā wánchéng
English: Even if it will take me six weeks, I am determined to finish the job.

Chinese: 咱们一起复习你的英语练习好吗？
Pinyin: zánmen yīqǐ fùxí nǐ de Yīngyǔ liànxí hǎo ma
English: Shall we go over your English exercises together?

Chinese: 我已经在这家旅馆里住了两个星期了。
Pinyin: wǒ yǐjīng zài zhè jiā lǚguǎn lǐ zhù le liǎng gè xīngqī le
English: I have been resident in this hotel for two weeks.

Chinese: 请接受我的慰问。
Pinyin: qǐng jiēshòu wǒ de wèiwèn
English: Please accept my condolences.

Chinese: 在桌上的银相框里有张她丈夫的照片。
Pinyin: zài zhuō shàng de yín xiàngkuàng lǐ yǒu zhāng tā zhàngfu de zhàopiàn
English: In a silver frame on the table there is a photograph of her husband.

Chinese: 这本书是他以前写的剧本的扩充。
Pinyin: zhè běn shū shì tā yǐqián xiě de jùběn de kuòchōng
English: This book is an expansion of the play he wrote before.

Chinese: 她不把我们的警告放在心上。
Pinyin: tā bù bǎ wǒmen de jǐnggào fàngzàixīnshàng
English: She paid no heed to our warnings.

Chinese: 我确信他是个可靠的接班人。
Pinyin: wǒ quèxìn tā shì gè kěkào de jiēbānrén
English: I am sure that he is a reliable successor.

Chinese: 她的书法有了明显的进步。
Pinyin: tā de shūfǎ yǒule míngxiǎn de jìnbù
English: There's been a noticeable improvement in her handwriting.

Chinese: 我们想去参加化装舞会。
Pinyin: wǒmen xiǎng qù cānjiā huàzhuāng wǔhuì
English: We want to join in the masquerade.

Chinese: 他和往常一样努力工作。
Pinyin: tā hé wǎngcháng yīyàng nǔlì gōngzuò
English: He works as hard as ever.

Chinese: 该被责怪的人是你。
Pinyin: gāi bèi zéguài de rén shì nǐ
English: It is you who are to blame.

Chinese: 你喜欢香港吗？
Pinyin: nǐ xǐhuan Xiānggǎng ma
English: How do you like Hong Kong?

Chinese: 她喜欢随着快节奏的音乐跳舞。
Pinyin: tā xǐhuan suízhe kuài jiézòu de yīnyuè tiàowǔ
English: She loves to dance to fast music.

Chinese: 我不太满意他对这个句子的翻译。
Pinyin: wǒ bù tài mǎnyì tā duì zhège jùzi de fānyì
English: I'm not satisfied with his interpretation of this sentence.

Chinese: 我对他很生气，因为他让我等了好久。
Pinyin: wǒ duì tā hěn shēngqì yīnwèi tā ràng wǒděng le hǎojiǔ
English: I was angry with him for keeping me waiting.

Chinese: 即使下雨我们也要去。
Pinyin: jíshǐ xiàyǔ wǒmen yě yào qù
English: We'll go even if it rains.

Chinese: 她的亲切给我留下了很深的印象。
Pinyin: tā de qīnqiè gěi wǒ liúxià le hěn shēn de yìnxiàng
English: Her gentleness has given me a deep impression.

Chinese: 请您放心，还款是有保障的。
Pinyin: qǐng nín fàngxīn huánkuǎn shì yǒu bǎozhàng de
English: Please rest assured that repayment is ensured.

Chinese: 你能告诉我去火车站最近的路吗？
Pinyin: nǐ néng gàosu wǒ qù huǒchēzhàn zuìjìn de lù ma
English: Can you tell me the nearest way to the railway station?

Chinese: 老师赞扬了她的勇气。
Pinyin: lǎoshī zànyáng le tā de yǒngqì
English: The teacher praised her for her courage.

Chinese: 人是有理性的生物。
Pinyin: rén shì yǒu lǐxìng de shēngwù
English: Man is a rational being.

Chinese: 未成熟的苹果是酸的。
Pinyin: wèi chéngshú de píngguǒ shì suān de
English: Green apples are sour.

Chinese: 我们在危险的时候应该保持冷静。
Pinyin: wǒmen zài wēixiǎn de shíhou yīnggāi bǎochí lěngjìng
English: We should keep our composure in danger.

Chinese: 我们应该学习祖先的成就。
Pinyin: wǒmen yīnggāi xuéxí zǔxiān de chéngjiù
English: We should study our ancestral achievements.

Chinese: 他让他的马退出了比赛。
Pinyin: tā ràng tā de mǎ tuìchū le bǐsài
English: He withdrew his horse from the race.

Chinese: 你能扶我上楼梯吗？
Pinyin: nǐ néng fú wǒ shàng lóutī ma
English: Could you help me up the stairs?

Chinese: 他得了肺炎。
Pinyin: tā déle fèiyán
English: He has an inflammation of the lungs.

Chinese: 她和我在学院里是同学。
Pinyin: tā hé wǒ zài xuéyuàn lǐ shì tóngxué
English: She and I were contemporaries at college.

Chinese: 他的诗集去年发表了。
Pinyin: tā de shījí qùnián fābiǎo le
English: His poetry was published last year.

Chinese: 我想北极地区的人要比这里的少得多。
Pinyin: wǒ xiǎng běijí dìqū de rén yào bǐ zhèlǐ de shǎo dé duō
English: I guess there are much less people in the Arctic regions than here.

Chinese: 我喜欢读一些关于电子音乐的书。
Pinyin: wǒ xǐhuan dú yīxiē guānyú diànzǐ yīnyuè de shū
English: I like to read books on electronic music.

Chinese: 他要我问候你。
Pinyin: tā yào wǒ wènhòu nǐ
English: He asked me to inquire after you.

Chinese: 你们有适合我穿的现成的衣服吗？
Pinyin: nǐmen yǒu shìhé wǒ chuān de xiànchéng de yīfu ma
English: Do you have anything ready- make that will fit me?
